summary: Tested Vaahan API Integration (P0) - All features working correctly. Backend endpoint POST /api/inspections/{id}/fetch-vaahan-data returns engine_number and chassis_number. Frontend Live Progress Modal shows Vehicle tab with all Vaahan data fields including Engine Number and Chassis Number in the Vehicle Identification section.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vaahan API integration fully tested and working. Test inspection ID: d4a31696-0fb6-4a4a-9e45-7f6927ab98de (BR02BA4257). Backend stores vaahan_data in inspection record with engine_number, chassis_number, and all other vehicle details. Frontend displays data in Live Progress Modal under Vehicle & RTO tab.

features_tested.backend_fetch_vaahan_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/inspections/{id}/fetch-vaahan-data returns 200 with engine_number and chassis_number
features_tested.backend_engine_number: PASS - engine_number field present in vaahan_data (F8DN650XXXX)
features_tested.backend_chassis_number: PASS - chassis_number field present in vaahan_data (MA3EUA61S00H5XXXX)
features_tested.backend_all_vehicle_details: PASS - All expected fields present (registration_number, manufacturer, model, color, fuel_type, etc.)
features_tested.backend_data_persistence: PASS - vaahan_data stored in inspection record
features_tested.backend_rto_verification_status: PASS - rto_verification_status set to VERIFIED after fetch
features_tested.backend_source_field: PASS - Response includes source field (local_db or vaahan_api)
features_tested.frontend_vehicle_tab: PASS - Vehicle & RTO tab visible in Live Progress Modal
features_tested.frontend_vaahan_banner: PASS - 'Vaahan API Verified' banner displayed with ACTIVE status
features_tested.frontend_engine_number_field: PASS - Engine Number field visible with value F8DN650XXXX
features_tested.frontend_chassis_number_field: PASS - Chassis Number field visible with value MA3EUA61S00H5XXXX
features_tested.frontend_vehicle_details: PASS - Make, Model, Year, Colour, Body Type, Vehicle Class all displayed
